subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The horizon of manifestation is resplendent, and the sphere of utterance surges and flows upon the ocean of divine knowledge. How blessed is this hour [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله افق ظهور منیر است و فلک بیان بر بحر عرفان ساری و جاری نیکو است حال
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
